response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR crew_type : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR flight_number : varchar
ATTR airline_code : varchar
ATTR airline_name : varchar
ATTR departure_airport_code : varchar
ATTR departure_airport_name : varchar
ATTR departure_location_code : varchar
ATTR departure_city : varchar
ATTR arrival_airport_code : varchar
ATTR arrival_airport_name : varchar
ATTR arrival_location_code : varchar
ATTR arrival_city : varchar
ATTR aircraft_code : varchar
ATTR aircraft_registration : varchar
ATTR aircraft_model : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Aircraft
PK aircraft_registration
ATTR aircraft_registration : varchar : PK
ATTR aircraft_model : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR crew_type : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_description : varchar

REL Flight -> Passenger : 1..N -> 1..N : FK=passenger_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1..N : FK=departure_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1..N : FK=arrival_airport_code
REL Flight -> Aircraft : 1 -> 1 : FK=aircraft_registration
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_code
REL Flight -> CrewMember : 1..N -> 1 : FK=crew_id
